items.title: Food Court Report — Station-wise Order Breakdown
items.description: New custom report screen showing order-level revenue split by kitchen station. Layout clones Order Ledger (S6): S7 header, flat table, KPI strip, TOTAL row, search, column chooser, side-sheet drill, Excel/PDF export. One new top-level filter: Station dropdown (one station at a time). Each order row shows only the selected station items with item name, qty, price, subtotal, GST, total. Data source: order-logs-report order_details_table[].station_name.
items.notes: Sidebar entry: Food Court (under Custom Reports or Insights). Route: /reports-module/food-court. Tabs: simple (All/Settled). Station filter replaces tab-level complexity.

items.title: Schedule Order — Place orders for future date/time
items.notes: Schedule orders for future date/time. Payload keys scheduled=1 + schedule_at already exist in orderTransform.js (hardcoded 0/null). Dine-In + TakeAway + Walk-In. 15-min interval picker. Backend escalation: scheduled orders not in running orders API. POST-DELIVERY FIX (2026-06-10): schedule_at trailing space removed (was sending midnight 00:00:00), Place Order disable guard strengthened to require time component.

items.title: POS orders with fOrderStatus 7 incorrectly trigger ScanOrderPopOut popup
items.notes: isUnconfirmedScanOrder predicate uses fOrderStatus===7 as web proxy but backend assigns status 7 to POS orders too. Fix: add && order.isWebOrder. POS YTC orders get tick button instead of Accept/Reject. POST-DELIVERY FIXES (2026-06-10): (1) Cancel X button added to POS YTC on OrderCard (owner confirmed X+tick needed). (2) Snooze clock gated to web-only on TableCard (table.isWebOrder===true).

items.title: Restaurant Settings — Self-Onboarding Setup Wizard
items.files: RestaurantSettingsPage.jsx (NEW), restaurantSettingsService.js (NEW), restaurantSettingsTransform.js (NEW), App.js, Sidebar.jsx, constants.js
items.notes: 6-step wizard for restaurant self-onboarding. Steps: 1-Restaurant Identity & Tax (required), 2-Channels & Payments (required), 3-Charges & Tips (optional), 4-Order & Kitchen (optional), 5-Inventory & Extras (optional), 6-Owner Info (required). APIs: GET settings-list + POST update-settings. Interactive mockup at /mockup-wizard.html.

items.title: Cancellations report Order-Level scope never matches — code compares 'cancelled' but API sends 'Cancel'
items.status: IMPLEMENTED + QA PASSED (harness replica to the rupee)
items.notes: 0/259 cancelled orders matched order scope in Mar-Jun 2026 across cafe103 AND palmhouse audits. Order-Level tab permanently empty; all order-cancels render under Item-Level. 1-line fix: match pm==='cancel' or fStatus===3 (reportTransform already does this).
items.decisions: All owner decisions locked 2026-06-11 — see OWNER_DECISION_QUEUE.md Category H + addendum

items.title: insightsService reads non-existent ot.round_off — API field is round_up; Items & Menu under-reports Sold revenue
items.status: IMPLEMENTED + QA PASSED (harness replica to the rupee)
items.notes: Round-off never distributed to items: palmhouse Mar Rs460/Apr Rs305/May Rs272/Jun Rs23; cafe103 ~Rs100+/month. 1-line fix: round_off -> round_up at insightsService.js line ~93.
items.decisions: All owner decisions locked 2026-06-11 — see OWNER_DECISION_QUEUE.md Category H + addendum

items.title: Dashboard 'Unsettled TAB' tile is dead code — condition nested inside isPaid branch, always Rs0
items.status: IMPLEMENTED + QA PASSED (GO-2; harness 31/31 March to the rupee; live UI verified)
items.notes: if (pm==='tab' && fStatus!=='6') is inside the fStatus==='6' branch — unreachable. Live-confirmed Rs0 despite 319 TAB orders (palmhouse) / 141 (cafe103). Note: backend stamps TAB fStatus=6 (BUG-129) so even corrected logic reads 0 — tile needs redefinition or removal.
items.decisions: All owner decisions locked 2026-06-11 — see OWNER_DECISION_QUEUE.md Category H + addendum

items.title: Dashboard double-fetches identical /order-logs-report payload (~40MB x2 per load at palmhouse)
items.status: IMPLEMENTED + QA PASSED (harness replica to the rupee)
items.notes: ordersResp and cancelDataResp are byte-identical POSTs (same sort_by/from/to). Comment claims cancel_at-attribution purpose but wider window never implemented — cancels of orders created before range are missed.
items.decisions: All owner decisions locked 2026-06-11 — see OWNER_DECISION_QUEUE.md Category H + addendum

items.title: Backend stamps TAB (credit) orders f_order_status=6 before money is collected
items.notes: All 319 palmhouse + 141 cafe103 TAB orders have fStatus=6 at punch. Root cause of CR-030/TAB policy ambiguity: frontend cannot distinguish settled vs outstanding credit from the list payload. Backend team item.
items.decisions: All owner decisions locked 2026-06-11 — see OWNER_DECISION_QUEUE.md Category H + addendum

items.title: Room order scope consistency — one shared room predicate + per-screen incl./excl. rooms badge or toggle
items.status: IMPLEMENTED + QA PASSED (GO-2; harness 31/31 March to the rupee; live UI verified)
items.files: insightsService.js, orderLedgerService.js, SalesMockup, PaymentsMockup, DashboardMockup, ItemSales*
items.notes: Palmhouse live impact: Dashboard/Items include rooms, Sales/Payments/Ledger exclude. Mar gap Rs1,78,172; Card mix differs by Rs1.4L. Also payment_method='ROOM' with order_in=null edge (4 orders Jun).
items.decisions: All owner decisions locked 2026-06-11 — see OWNER_DECISION_QUEUE.md Category H + addendum

items.title: Revenue attribution toggle — punch date vs collection date, standardized + labelled on every Insights screen
items.status: IMPLEMENTED + QA PASSED (GO-2; harness 31/31 March to the rupee; live UI verified)
items.notes: Jun 3 palmhouse: punch Rs7,838 vs collection Rs22,897/24,892. Order 014894 punched May 16, collected Jun 8. No single day reconciles between Insights and Settlement/backend. Owner decision needed: canonical basis or labelled toggle.
items.decisions: All owner decisions locked 2026-06-11 — see OWNER_DECISION_QUEUE.md Category H + addendum

items.title: Canonical cancellation money formula — Dashboard vs Cancellations report disagree every month
items.status: IMPLEMENTED + QA PASSED (GO-3; Sold+Credit≡oldSold to the rupee; Credit May ₹49,460 exact; 4 cross-month cancels surfaced)
items.notes: Palmhouse deltas: Mar 13,475 / Apr 6,658 / May 10,453. Causes: order_amount+raw price vs line subtotal+tax; cancel_at vs created_at gates; line-count vs qty-count. Depends on BUG-125 fix landing first.
items.decisions: All owner decisions locked 2026-06-11 — see OWNER_DECISION_QUEUE.md Category H + addendum

items.title: Shared payment-method classifier module — handle pending/partial/cash_on_delivery/zero-amount-paid consistently
items.status: IMPLEMENTED + QA PASSED (GO-2; harness 31/31 March to the rupee; live UI verified)
items.notes: New live enums at palmhouse: 'pending' (13 orders, unknown to all classifiers), 'partial' (Sales 'Partial' vs Dashboard raw 'partial'; Mar Rs2,268 vs Rs9,858), 'cash_on_delivery' (6, classified Cash by substring luck), zero-amount paid orders (May: 17) skew AOV.
items.decisions: All owner decisions locked 2026-06-11 — see OWNER_DECISION_QUEUE.md Category H + addendum

items.title: Settlement report 'total sale' basis — define + reconcile against Insights (backend ask)
items.notes: Palmhouse Mar: settlement total_sale Rs15,03,418 vs Dashboard Rs13,46,993 (most inclusive frontend figure) vs Sales Rs11,68,821 — ~Rs1.4L unexplained even after adding cancels/pending. Settlement screen cannot be footed against anything until basis is documented.

items.title: Items & Menu — Order Ledger-style buckets (Sold / Added to Credit / Cancelled / Pending Billing)
items.status: IMPLEMENTED + QA PASSED (GO-3; Sold+Credit≡oldSold to the rupee; Credit May ₹49,460 exact; 4 cross-month cancels surfaced)
items.source: Owner Q4 ruling 2026-06-11 (Insights audit batch, OWNER_DECISION_QUEUE Category H addendum)
items.notes: Buckets by parent-order ledger category; punch-dated (ITEMS-BASIS ruling); cancelled bucket by cancel_at; TAB cumulative — credit items never move (Q4).
